scripts.check:c: cmake -S . -B build/cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug && cmake --build build/cmake && ctest --test-dir build/cmake --output-on-failure
scripts.check:c:sanitize: cmake -S . -B build/cmake-sanitize -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DAETHER_ENABLE_SANITIZERS=ON && cmake --build build/cmake-sanitize && ctest --test-dir build/cmake-sanitize --output-on-failure
scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace
scripts.check:pack: pnpm --filter @aether-contracts/typescript build && node scripts/check-typescript-pack.mjs && cargo package --package aether-contracts --allow-dirty --locked && cargo package --package aether-contracts --allow-dirty --locked --no-verify --list && node scripts/check-cmake-install.mjs
scripts.check: pnpm test && pnpm check:pack && pnpm check:c && pnpm check:rust && pnpm hashes:check
